raw_output:
For a college student performing general schoolwork, I'd suggest the Acer Aspire 5 as an excellent choice. It offers a good balance between performance and affordability. This laptop comes equipped with a powerful AMD Ryzen 3000 series processor, ensuring smooth multitasking for your everyday needs.

The Aspire 5 also features a Full HD IPS display, which is perfect for streaming lectures or presentations. It has a long-lasting battery life, allowing you to work on the go without worrying about running out of power. Additionally, it includes a backlit keyboard, making studying in low light conditions more comfortable.

Overall, the Acer Aspire 5 is an ideal laptop for college students who are looking for a reliable and affordable device to handle their general schoolwork effectively.
